title: The Big Baboon
content:
The Big Baboon is found upon
    The plains of Cariboo:
    He goes about with nothing on
    (A shocking thing to do).

    But if he dressed up respectably
    And let his whiskers grow,
    How like this Big Baboon would be
    To Mister So-and-so!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Hilaire Belloc, titled "The Big Baboon", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
